summary: Added a single closing bridge to carry the house damage and incoming rain cleanly into chapter 8's wet-document aftermath. The opening already differed structurally from the visible adjacent opening, so no opening rewrite was needed.
edits: Added the torn loft-shelf detail at the chapter close to set up the overnight rain intrusion in chapter 8.
Confirmed the style bible contains no example_lines field, so no calibration-line replacements were required.
